Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal

Class ArrayValidatorImpl<A,E>

java.lang.Object
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension.AbstractObjectValidator<ArrayValidator<A,E>,A>
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.ArrayValidatorImpl<A,E>
Type Parameters:
A - the type of the array
E - the type of elements in the array
All Implemented Interfaces:
ArrayValidator<A,E>, ExtensibleObjectValidator<ArrayValidator<A,E>,A>
public final class ArrayValidatorImpl<A,E> extends AbstractObjectValidator<ArrayValidator<A,E>,A> implements ArrayValidator<A,E>
Default implementation of ArrayValidator.

    Description

  • Constructor Details

    • ArrayValidatorImpl

      public ArrayValidatorImpl(ApplicationScope scope, Configuration config, String name, A actual, Supplier<List<E>> actualAsListSupplier, BiFunction<Object,Object,Boolean> equals, Function<Object,Boolean> contains, Supplier<Integer> length, List<ValidationFailure> failures, boolean fatalFailure)
      Parameters:
      scope - the application configuration
      config - the instance configuration
      name - the name of the value
      actual - the actual value
      actualAsListSupplier - returns a List representation of the array
      equals - returns true if the array is equal to an object
      contains - returns true if the array contains a value
      length - returns the length of the array
      failures - the list of validation failures
      fatalFailure - true if validation stopped as the result of a fatal failure
      Throws:
      AssertionError - if any of the parameters except for actual are null. If name is empty.

  • Method Details

    • isEqualTo

      public ArrayValidator<A,E> isEqualTo(Object expected)
      Description copied from interface: ExtensibleObjectValidator
      Ensures that the actual value is equal to an expected value.

      Parameters:

      Returns:
      the updated validator

    • containsExactly

      public ArrayValidatorImpl<A,E> containsExactly(Collection<E> expected)
      Description copied from interface: ArrayValidator
      Ensures that the actual value contains the specified elements; nothing less, nothing more.
      Specified by:
      containsExactly in interface ArrayValidator<A,E>
      Parameters:
      expected - the elements that must exist
      Returns:
      the updated validator
